examples: As I have grown older, I became braver.
It's not because I'm braver or more daring than others.
Wendy said tea first quickly, and Michael pressed her hand in gratitude, but the braver John hesitated.
By Greek standards Mr Papandreou has been courageous, but he should have been braver still.
Plus admitting that and going on to try other new things can actually make you braver.
